overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a foggy industrial district at night illuminated by orange sodium streetlights. The player navigates past the 'Foodscape' restaurant, under an overpass, and encounters various pedestrians including a police officer in the dense atmospheric haze.

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close by the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy industrial sidewalk toward distant figures

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial tank looming in the fog with red lights on top
metal truss structure spanning overhead with pipes and cables
tall street lamp casting warm orange glow through the fog
metal fence running parallel to the walkway separating from tracks
large warehouse-like structure with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial walkway at night, with a massive cylindrical water tank visible through the haze ahead. Orange sodium streetlights cast a warm glow through the mist as the camera moves forward along a concrete path bordered by a chain-link fence on the left and industrial buildings on the right.

events.description: approaching intersection with green traffic light visible ahead
turning right at the corner onto a new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right at the corner past the Foodscape restaurant

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past the intersection in the fog

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing green light
red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' on building facade
yellow street sign with black text reading 'Eisenhower'

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection where the camera crosses the street beneath a green traffic light. The iconic red 'FOODSCAPE' neon sign becomes visible on the right as the camera turns the corner, passing an 'Eisenhower' street sign. A car drives past in the foggy street as the environment shifts from industrial to a more commercial corner.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the large overpass structure
police officer in tactical gear walks past the camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the Foodscape restaurant and continuing under the overpass

notable_agents.action: police officer wearing helmet and tactical vest walks past the camera

entered.detail: yellow street sign reading 'Goldsmith' mounted on pole
large concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the street
elevated guard tower with lights visible in the fog

segments.scene_description: Walking past the Foodscape restaurant, the camera passes under a large overpass structure that blocks the sky entirely. A police officer in tactical gear walks past closely on the right. The 'Goldsmith' street sign appears on the left as the environment becomes more enclosed and industrial, with a security watchtower visible through the fog in the distance.

events.description: approaching a group of pedestrians walking ahead in the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass approaching a group of pedestrians ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues deep under the overpass where the lighting becomes darker and more enclosed. The concrete industrial building remains prominent on the right while the camera approaches a group of pedestrians walking ahead in the fog. The atmosphere remains thick with haze as the walkway continues into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial district at night that transitions from an open walkway into a claustrophobic underpass. It begins on a concrete path bordered by a chain-link fence, moving toward a massive cylindrical water tank illuminated by the warm glow of orange sodium streetlights. As the camera reaches a wider intersection, the environment shifts from industrial to commercial, passing a green traffic light and the red neon sign of a Foodscape restaurant. The scene then moves beneath a massive overpass that blocks the sky, passing a tactical police officer and a Goldsmith street sign as the space becomes more enclosed. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the dark, hazy shadows of the overpass, following a group of pedestrians toward a distant security watchtower.
